Container.Name: AppFlowy-AI
Container.Overview: [Step 6/7 · optional] AppFlowy AI — optional Python service providing LLM-powered chat, document summarisation, and embedding generation for AppFlowy Cloud. Requires an OpenAI or Azure OpenAI API key. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Requires: Custom Docker network named "appflowy" must exist before deploying any container in this stack. Create it via SSH or the Unraid terminal: docker network create appflowy — Network Type is pre-set to "appflowy" by default, verify it is selected.
Container.Description:
AppFlowy AI — a Python/FastAPI service that bridges AppFlowy Cloud to OpenAI (or Azure OpenAI) for AI chat, summaries, and document embeddings.

This container is optional. AppFlowy functions without it, but AI-powered features (chat, search summaries, embeddings) will be unavailable. You must provide a valid OpenAI API Key (or Azure OpenAI credentials).

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search, AppFlowy-AI → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: OpenAI API key. Required unless using Azure OpenAI. Used for chat and embeddings.

Config.Name: Azure OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Azure-hosted OpenAI API key. Use this instead of OPENAI_API_KEY for Azure deployments.

Config.Name: Azure OpenAI Endpoint
Config.Description: Azure OpenAI resource endpoint URL (e.g. https://my-resource.openai.azure.com/).

Config.Name: AppFlowy Host (Base URL)
Config.Description: Public-facing base URL. Must match APPFLOWY_BASE_URL in AppFlowy-Cloud.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Shared JWT secret. Must be identical to GoTrue and AppFlowy-Cloud.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string for the AI service (uses psycopg driver syntax).

Config.Name: S3 Region
Config.Description: AWS S3 region (leave empty for MinIO).

Config.Name: AI Server Port
Config.Description: Port the AI service listens on. Must match AI_SERVER_PORT in AppFlowy-Cloud.

Config.Name: Default AI Model
Config.Description: Default OpenAI chat model (e.g. gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4o). Must be available in your OpenAI account.
